implementation_drift.description: Inline-corrected substring count for 2504.07104: 'retrieval relevance' is NOT substring of 'Relevance' alone. Recounted to overlap=1 not 4, downgraded to agent-judged.

honest_note: Form C quantitative claim is occupied at the umbrella level — Power-law IR (Manning ACM 2816815) covers the universal-power-law claim. The specific α=1.07 numeric is a refinement, not a paradigm shift. v2 query rules surfaced AlphaZero-Zipf-scaling 2412.11979 which connects Zipf to LLM scaling exponents directly. forced_hit_count = 6, all on substantive (not encyclopedic-noise) papers.
